project_type: React+TypeScript+Vite board game with Express+WebSocket backend
test_framework: None currently - no tests in the project
test_command: npm run build (TypeScript type-check + Vite build as validation)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript errors. 2. Start the server with npm run server and verify it starts without errors.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Direct push to main branch.
key_patterns: Single Zustand store (gameStore.ts) holds all UI+game state. GameState type in types/game.ts is the central data structure. Server uses Express+WebSocket with in-memory lobbies. Game logic lives in utils/gameLogic.ts as pure functions. i18n uses custom hook useT() with en.ts/es.ts translation files. Components are functional React with hooks.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json. src/: App.tsx, main.tsx. src/components/: All React components. src/store/: gameStore.ts (Zustand). src/types/: game.ts (types+constants). src/utils/: gameLogic.ts (pure game logic). src/server/: index.ts (Express+WebSocket). src/i18n/: en.ts, es.ts, index.ts.
